title: BTC rerates if US crypto clarity unlocks institutional pipes faster than priced
thesis_statement: If the Clarity Act passes with workable custody and market-structure rules, BTC can rerate as regulated pipes absorb institutional flows that today sit bottlenecked by legal ambiguity — especially if ETF balances and on-exchange volumes inflect within weeks of enactment.
why_now: Congressional momentum and committee language are shifting while BTC still trades as if compliant rails will take quarters to matter — the legislative window is live now, not hypothetical.
whats_unpriced: The tape anchors on signing headlines but underweights lagged broker enablement, treasury desk onboarding, and cumulative ETF flows once rule text is actionable — the repricing can arrive after the ceremony.
trigger_entry_setup: Act only after final statutory language plus two consecutive weeks of rising ETF net flows and stablecoin transfer velocity confirming balances are moving through compliant venues — ignore one-day headline spikes without flow confirmation.
stop: Stand down if enabling rulemaking stalls past credible deadlines, if major exchanges face existential enforcement actions, or if BTC loses structural demand after passage while macro liquidation dominates.
target: Scale toward peaks tied to sustained flow pulses and volatility compression — trail risk once stacked balance-sheet and advisor mandate evidence confirms the narrative is paying through positioning, not only sentiment.

scenario_base.confirms: Law passes but implementation chops persist — desks rebuild stacks slowly while headline volatility resets conviction each week.
scenario_base.consequence: Smaller core exposure, wider risk buffers; add size only when flows and volumes confirm pipes are filling.

scenario_bull.confirms: Clean rulebook accelerates ETF and treasury pipelines; transfer volumes step-change and regulated balances rise in tandem.
scenario_bull.consequence: Thesis pays faster — scale methodically as flows compound while trailing invalidation levels.

scenario_bear.confirms: Bill stalls, language is watered down, or macro risk-off overwhelms micro bullish catalyst before flows inflect.
scenario_bear.consequence: Retire the squeeze framing — cut or exit per invalidation before averaging into drawdowns.
